title: cucullaria excelsa
intro: Cucullaria excelsa, also known as the helmet lichen, is a type of lichen that belongs to the family Ramalinaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Cucullaria excelsa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially treating conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, it is often used in the form of teas, tinctures, or creams, and is also incorporated into ointments and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
